word: G3837 - πανταχοῦ - pantachoû - pan-takh-oo' - In all places

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πανταχοῦ

- Transliteration: Pantachou

- Phonetic: pan-takh-oo'

- Definition:

1. everywhere

- Origin: genitive case (as adverb of place) of a presumed derivative of G3956

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Genitive case (as adverb of place) of a presumed derivative of G3956; universally: - in all places everywhere.
